name: Space Station Alpha
description: You are aboard Space Station Alpha, orbiting a distant planet. Systems are failing and you need to find a way to restore power.
author: TextGame Engine

rooms.name: Command Bridge
rooms.description: The command bridge is dimly lit by emergency lights. Control panels flicker sporadically.

rooms.name: Main Corridor
rooms.description: A long corridor connects the various sections of the station. Emergency lighting casts eerie shadows.

rooms.name: Engineering Bay
rooms.description: The heart of the station's systems. Diagnostic screens show critical failures across multiple systems.

rooms.name: Medical Bay
rooms.description: A sterile medical facility with several examination beds. Medical supplies are scattered about.

rooms.name: Airlock Chamber
rooms.description: The airlock chamber leading to the exterior of the station. Warning lights flash on the door control panel.

items.name: tablet
items.description: A portable data tablet with station schematics and system status information.
items.useDescription: The tablet displays critical system alerts and a map of the station.

items.name: wrench
items.description: A heavy-duty magnetic wrench used for station repairs.
items.useDescription: You tighten a few loose bolts with the wrench.

items.name: powercell
items.description: A fresh power cell that could restore systems to full functionality.
items.useDescription: The power cell hums with energy as you activate it.

items.name: console
items.description: The main engineering console. It's powered down but looks intact.
items.useDescription: The console requires a power cell to function.

items.name: medkit
items.description: A standard emergency medical kit containing bandages and basic medical supplies.
items.useDescription: You apply some bandages from the medkit. You feel a bit better.

items.name: spacesuit
items.description: A full EVA spacesuit designed for extravehicular activities.
items.useDescription: You put on the spacesuit. It seals with a hiss and the heads-up display activates.
